nodes.label: Next.js Wordmark
nodes.rationale: The SVG consists of black vector paths forming the recognizable horizontal Next.js brand wordmark.

nodes.label: Next.js
nodes.rationale: The asset filename `next.svg` and the rendered vector shapes together indicate that this image represents the Next.js framework's branding.

nodes.label: Nonstandard Next.js Version
nodes.rationale: The file warns that this project's Next.js version has breaking changes, so local framework docs should be consulted before making changes.
